description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and releases/* branches and on pull requests to master. The workflow has concurrent runs grouped by GitHub reference and cancels in-progress runs. It includes four jobs: ubuntu for native x86-64 build on ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-arm for native ARM64 build on ubuntu-24.04-arm, msys2 for native x86-64 build on windows-2022 with MSYS2, and macos for native ARM64 build on macos-14. Each job checks out the code, installs dependencies, sets up Meson, configures, builds, and runs tests.
